name: genie-method
description: The Genie Method: Written by a medical professional for doctors, lawyers, plumbers, trainers, and anyone who isn't a developer. A proven system to build real apps and write complete books with AI — no coding required. Front-loads all thinking into a blueprint, then generates step-by-step instructions AI can execute with near-zero errors. Two skills: spec-to-scripts (build apps) and write-to-publish (write books, reports, and documents).
